summary: All 5 steps completed. Step-1: wrote failing test for spurious initial dispatch (effect falls through to else branch on creation, scheduling debounced sendSelection(null,null)). Step-2: added early-return guard `if (!selectionChanged && !hoverChanged) return;` after prev-tracking updates. Step-3: wrote clearHighlights atomicity test (passes as regression guard — sync effect doesn't track highlightedParams). Step-4: added batch() import and wrapped clearHighlights body. Step-5: updated beforeEach comment. All 24 tests pass.
notes: Step-1 test needed vi.advanceTimersByTime(100) OUTSIDE createRoot callback to observe the spurious dispatch — Solid.js effects run synchronously during root creation but the fake timer callback hasn't fired until advanced. Step-3 test doesn't strictly fail before the batch fix because the sync effect only tracks selectedEntity/hoveredEntity, not highlightedParams. Must run vitest from gui/ directory (v3.2.4) not repo root (which picks up v4.1.2 with different config).
